etymology.description: 炎(炎) ('fire') + 舛(舛) ('feet') -> 炎 viewed as unrelated combination in seal script -> 米(米) ('rice') and 舛 -> final form
etymology.interpretation: Originally used for phonetic value in related characters, 粦(粦) (lín, 'fire') illustration evolved into differing components through script transformation, indicating its complex historical progression into the regular script.
